allow: PowerShell(agent-browser fill @e6 "Rahim Uddin"; agent-browser fill @e8 "+8801712345678"; agent-browser fill @e10 "rahim.test@example.com"; agent-browser fill @e23 "Need 500 bags of cement delivered to Bashundhara R/A by next week."; agent-browser snapshot -i -c -d 3 2>&1 | Select-String "submit|Submit|spinbutton|textbox" | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(agent-browser get value @e6; agent-browser get value @e8; agent-browser get value @e10; agent-browser get value @e23 2>&1)
PowerShell(agent-browser eval "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('input,textarea'\)\).map\(e => \({name: e.name, type: e.type, value: e.value}\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(agent-browser fill "textarea[name=message]" "Need 500 bags of cement delivered to Bashundhara R/A by next week." 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec alivia-api pnpm exec prisma generate 2>&1)
